storyDialogue.text: Get started! Use ‣ AUTO for automatic scene change, LEFT/RIGHT icon for manual navigation, and toggle music/voice on the top right icon.
via the options menu, You can change Typing speed and other settings.
[blink] The heart monitor is the only applause you get now. You saved millions. The reward? A corporate bioweapon rotting your veins from the inside out.
The 'heroes' smiled for the cameras, collected their corporate sponsorships, and threw you in this quarantined basement. [drain] 'Tragic collateral damage,' they told the press.
You can feel your lungs crystallizing. You are suffocating in the dark, erased by the very society you bled to protect.
[shadows] Such a disgusting display of hypocrisy. They paraded your sacrifice, and now they let your flesh rot to protect their stock prices.
I do not care about their politics. I see a survivor. I can strip this virus from your marrow, but the process... it requires a new Quirk to anchor your fragile soul.
The choice is yours. Die choking on your own blood as a forgotten martyr... [drain] or let me remake you, and give you the power to make them choke on their [heartbeat] 'justice.'
[blink] The pain of rebirth was blinding. But the decay is gone. In its place is a dark, thrumming power, and for the first time, you are breathing freely.
Welcome to the Vanguard Action Squad. They are broken things, just like you. But here, you will not be discarded.
Look who finally woke up. The fallen golden child. Just don't slow us down, or I'll finish what that virus started and reduce you to ash. [glitch]
Oh, I'm so excited! You seem like someone who knows how to have fun! I can't wait to see what you're made of—maybe even [bloodsplatter] taste it! What's your blood type? Hehe!
Bah! I don't care about your tragic backstory! As long as you can take a punch and crush some skulls when we raid the camp, you're fine by me!
Welcome to the family, we love you! / Go back to the hospital and die, traitor!
You saw the ugly truth behind their capes. They are corporate lapdogs. Stain would respect that you survived their betrayal.
A tragic savior reborn as a phantom of vengeance! Truly, what a spectacular narrative arc! We shall make a grand debut together.
Society draws lines to keep people like us out, darling. You've crossed over. You're among real friends now.
Whatever. Just stay out of my gas when the time comes. I don't care how immune you think you are.
Flesh... so much beautiful flesh... don't tempt me... mustn't bite the new one...
Ten rejects. Psychopaths, murderers, and outcasts. Yet, as they map out the U.A. training camp raid, they look at you not as a liability to be buried, but as an equal.
[vhs] The Beast's Forest is burning. The air is thick with Mustard's toxic gas and the scent of Dabi's blue flames. The screams of U.A. students echo through the trees.
The target is Bakugo. Roast anyone else who gets in the way. It's time to show these kids what the real world looks like.
You step into the clearing. The absolute freedom from society's suffocating rules is intoxicating. But then, a familiar uniform breaks through the smoke.
[shake] WAIT! IT'S YOU! You were a hero! I watched you save that city! Why are you with THEM?!
Midoriya stands before you, battered and trembling, clinging desperately to the exact same naive ideals that almost put you in an unmarked grave.
The Vanguard squad is waiting in the shadows. The boy representing the society that left you to rot is begging for your soul.
Will you burn the hypocritical world to ash alongside the only people who saved your life... or will you step back into the light that discarded you?
